title: Ultimate Battle Music
description: Adds Battle music to the game!
body:
# IMPORTANT
**Due to copyrights, I had to change the included music in this Mod.**  
**I highly recommend you customise it by adding your own.**  

**This Mod provides default music. You can replace them with your own by overwriting the songs with a Resource Pack!**

## 🟡 [OPTIONAL RESOURCE PACK: Ultimate Music Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ultimate_music_pack)  


# ⚙️ CONFIGURATION
### This Mod is highly customisable to your taste:
- **🎶 DIFFERENT SONGS:** Add a single song or many! You can have a unique Battle music for Illagers, the Nether, and mob variants (such as Husk and Stray). Finally, you can have a unique musique for each vanilla Boss, and for Raids! Each of those can be disabled **or** play the normal Battle music instead.
- **🔊 VOLUME:** Set the volume of each unique song to your taste. **There is also an Underwater Pitch modifier to add variation, that you can switch off.**
- **🔉 FADE:** Add Fade in/out to the Battle music!
- **📡 DETECTION SYSTEM:** Pick between "Targetting Player" and Radius. The first one will play Battle music whenever a monster is actively chasing you. The second will play it if you're within a monster's radius.
- **⭕ RADIUS:** When Detection is by Radius, decide how big the Radius is for each Monster type.

**_NOTE: By default, Creepers only play music within a small Radius, to keep the vanilla element of surprise!_**

### 🎵 ALL BATTLE MUSIC TYPES:
These are ordered by priority. The higher priority will always play and force a fade-out on the others. For example, if you're fighting spiders and a Pillager Patrol spawns, the music will fade into the Illagers theme song!

This Mod provides default music. You can replace them with your own by overwriting the songs with a Resource Pack! The path for each file is as follows: assets\ultimate_battle_music\sounds\
1. **Bosses:** battle_enderdragon.ogg | battle_wither.ogg | battle_warden.ogg
2. **Raid:** battle_raid.ogg
3. **Illagers:** battle_illager.ogg
4. **Nether:** battle_nether.ogg
5. **Normal & Variant:** battle_music.ogg | battle_variant.ogg

It's fully client-side, no dependencies. Have fun!
